steps.t: The Elves of Elrond's Company can be found around the Edhelion Watch. You should seek out Elves with ideas on where to start investigating the dream.
The Elves of Elrond's Company can be found around the Edhelion Watch. You should seek out Elves with ideas on where to start investigating the dream.
Elladan waits on the road to Edhelion. You should speak with Elladan of what you learned from Merethen and Dorollas.
